use_codes.desc: FOR CLEANSING THE BOWEL IN PREPARATION FOR COLONOSCOPY, IN ADULTS 18 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER

indications.text: OsmoPrep® is indicated for cleansing of the colon as a preparation for colonoscopy in adults.

OsmoPrepTM Tablets are indicated for cleansing of the colon as a preparation for colonoscopy in adults
